data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time-boxed seat holds while checkout is in progress', but the evidence does not provide any concrete checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature. While the linked use case describes the expected behavior of holding seats for a specific duration, there is no evidence from prior steps that confirms this functionality is operational or tested. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for time-boxed seat holds.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of time-boxed seat holds during checkout.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
